leadText: Power Shift (Japanese: パワーシフト Power Shift) is a non-damaging Normal-type move introduced during Generation VIII, in Pokémon Legends: Arceus.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Power Shift switches the user's Attack and Special Attack stats with its Defense and Special Defense stats, respectively. Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Status PP 10 Agile Strong Power — — — Accuracy —% —% —% Action speed modifier Self -3 -4 +5 Target ? ? ? Additional effect Turns 5 4 7 ? ? ? ? Swaps the user's offensive and defensive stats Raises the user's action speed Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Power Shift switches the user's raw Attack stat with its raw Defense stat. Stat modifiers are not swapped.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description LA The user swaps its offensive and defensive stats. S V The user swaps its Attack and Defense stats.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Although Power Shift can be used in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet , no Pokémon that can know the move naturally are in those games, and Metronome does not select this move. This makes it the only move that is legally usable in only a singular game.
